summary: Export Birth Plan PDF and Cancel Invitation features fully tested. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: UI verified - Export Birth Plan button visible and clickable, My Team page shows Cancel/Remove functionality when team members exist.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts for testing share/revoke flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export Birth Plan PDF and Cancel Invitation features both working correctly. PDF endpoint generates valid PDF with %PDF header. Revoke endpoint properly fetches request data before deletion for cleanup. UI has Export Birth Plan button on /birth-plan page and Cancel button on /my-team page for pending invitations.

features_tested.GET /api/birth-plan/export/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF with %PDF header, correct content-type, attachment disposition
features_tested.DELETE /api/birth-plan/share/{request_id: PASS - Properly fetches request data before deletion, cleans up provider connections
features_tested.GET /api/birth-plan/share-requests: PASS - Returns list of share requests for MOM user
features_tested.POST /api/birth-plan/share: PASS - Creates share request with notification
features_tested.UI Birth Plan page: PASS - Export Birth Plan button visible and clickable
features_tested.UI My Team page: PASS - Shows team members, pending invitations with Cancel button, empty state

ui_elements_verified: Export Birth Plan button on /birth-plan page
Share with Provider button on /birth-plan page
Add Team Member button on /my-team page
Cancel button for pending invitations on /my-team page
Remove button for accepted team members on /my-team page
Empty state message when no team members
